50-schema-seed-habesha.title: Schema & Seed — Habesha Hub Domain
50-schema-seed-habesha.notes: Added whatsapp/instagram/tiktok/verifiedAt/businessHours to ProviderProfile, ProviderCategory join table, Deal model, icon/color on Category. Seeded 7 parent + 32 child Ethiopian business categories and 5 demo businesses across UAE cities. Updated DTOs and service to return categories, deals, country, city, whatsapp in search and profile responses. Build passes with 0 errors, 729 tests pass.

51-multi-category.title: Multi-Category Tagging
51-multi-category.notes: Added GET/PUT /providers/me/categories for multi-category assignment (1-5 categories, replace strategy). Search supports comma-separated category slugs and categoryIds with parent→child inclusion. Category tree supports withCount param. 16 unit tests for DTO validation, category assignment, search filtering, and category tree. Build passes, 745 tests pass.

52-country-city.title: Country & City Support
52-country-city.notes: Added location constants (6 countries, 26 cities with EN/AM/AR translations). Created LocationsModule with public GET /locations/countries and GET /locations/countries/:code/cities endpoints. Updated search to use exact matching for country/city. Added country/city validation to provider profile updates. 781 tests pass, build succeeds.

53-business-verification.title: Business Verification System
53-business-verification.notes: Added VerificationRequest model to Prisma schema. Created VerificationService with submit/status/list/review flows. Provider endpoints: POST/GET /providers/me/verification. Admin endpoints: GET /admin/verifications, PATCH /admin/verifications/:id (approve/reject). Approved requests set isVerified=true and verifiedAt on ProviderProfile. Search ranks verified businesses first (isVerified desc) and supports ?verified=true filter. 30 new tests (service + DTO validation). Build passes, 811 tests pass.

54-whatsapp-contact.title: WhatsApp & Contact Integration
54-whatsapp-contact.notes: Added ContactClick model to Prisma schema with whatsappMessage field on ProviderProfile. Created ContactClickService with WhatsApp URL generation (international format), contact URL formatting for all types (whatsapp/phone/email/website/instagram), click recording, and analytics (by type, daily, admin aggregate). Public endpoint POST /providers/:id/contact-click (rate-limited 10/min). Provider dashboard endpoints GET /providers/me/contact-stats and /contact-stats/daily. Admin endpoint GET /admin/analytics/contacts. Dashboard stats now include contact click counts. 33 new tests (service + DTO validation). Build passes, 844 tests pass.

55-deals-promotions.title: Deals & Promotions Module
55-deals-promotions.notes: Created DealsModule with full CRUD for providers (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /providers/me/deals), public endpoints (GET /deals, GET /deals/featured, GET /deals/:id) with filtering by country/city/category. Added expire-deals BullMQ recurring job (daily at midnight) to cleanup processor. Search integration: hasDeals=true filter and activeDeals count in provider search results. 33 new tests (service + DTO validation). Build passes, 877 tests pass.

56-branding-theme.title: Branding & Theme — Habesha Hub
56-branding-theme.notes: Rebranded all apps from Directory SaaS to Habesha Hub. Updated brand hue from 230 (blue) to 145 (Ethiopian green). Updated branding.ts defaults, CSS --brand-hue, index.html titles/meta tags, favicons (HH monogram SVG), i18n en.json/am.json translations, Docker .env and docker-compose defaults. Replaced vendor terminology with business throughout web app. Also updated mobile app config. Build passes, 877 tests pass.

57-web-homepage-search.title: Web App — Homepage & Search
57-web-homepage-search.notes: Redesigned homepage with country/city selector hero, 7-category grid with icons/colors, featured businesses with verified badges, deals section from API. Search page enhanced with country/city/verified/hasDeals filters, URL-driven shareable search, improved sort options (newest, name A-Z). Persistent search bar with autocomplete in header. New /categories/:slug detail view and /deals page. Updated all i18n strings (en.json + am.json). Build passes with 0 errors.

58-web-business-profile.title: Web App — Business Profile Page
58-web-business-profile.notes: Full business profile page with hero, verified badge, category badges, contact bar (WhatsApp/Phone/Email/Website/Instagram), about section, packages, gallery with lightbox, business hours with Open Now indicator, reviews with rating distribution + client review submission, FAQs accordion, active deals, related businesses, floating WhatsApp CTA, share (copy link/WhatsApp/Telegram). Added /business/:slug route. Backend: client review submission endpoint, public reviews list, review summary, related businesses endpoint. All i18n keys in en.json + am.json. Build passes, 877 tests pass.

59-web-browse-discovery.title: Web App — Browse & Discovery
59-web-browse-discovery.notes: Enhanced categories page with breadcrumbs, subcategory chip filtering, and embedded business grid with pagination. Created city page (/city/:country/:city) with hero, stats, and category filter tabs. Enhanced deals page with country/city/category filters and sort options (newest, ending soon, highest discount). Created recently added page (/new) with chronological business grid. Added cities index page (/cities) with all countries and cities. Updated header nav with Cities and Recently Added links. Updated footer with category links, city links per country. All i18n keys added to en.json and am.json. Build passes, 877 tests pass.

60-admin-moderation.title: Admin — Business Moderation
60-admin-moderation.notes: Added verification queue page with approve/reject flow and document viewing. Enhanced business list with country/city/categories/verified columns and filters, plus verify/feature/suspend quick actions. Created review moderation page with hide/restore, rating and visibility filters. Replaced placeholder dashboard with real stats (total businesses, pending verifications, new this week, total reviews, verified, contact clicks) and bar charts (businesses by country, contact clicks by type). Added Verifications and Reviews to admin sidebar. Backend: AdminReviewsController with listAllReviews/moderateReview, AdminDashboardController with stats/businesses-over-time/contact-clicks-by-type, enhanced AdminTenantsController with verify/feature endpoints and country/city/category/verified filters. All i18n keys in en.json and am.json. Build passes, 877 tests pass.

61-provider-customization.title: Provider Portal — Habesha Customization
61-provider-customization.notes: Customized provider portal for Habesha Hub: multi-category selector (searchable, max 5, primary marking) with API integration to /providers/me/categories; country/city cascading picker using /locations API; WhatsApp/Instagram/TikTok social media inputs; deals manager page with full CRUD (create/edit/delete dialogs, status badges, pagination); dashboard customized with contact analytics chart (30-day stacked bar by WhatsApp/phone/email), weekly trend with arrow, most popular contact method insight, stats cards (Profile Views, Contact Clicks, Reviews, Active Deals), quick actions (Edit Profile, Add Deal, View Listing); WhatsApp setup tab in settings with greeting message editor and live preview of chat link. All i18n keys added to en.json and am.json. Vite build passes, backend build passes, 877 tests pass.

62-i18n-amharic-arabic.title: i18n — Amharic & Arabic
62-i18n-amharic-arabic.notes: Full Arabic (ar.json) translations added to all 3 apps (web: 300 keys, provider-portal: 330 keys, admin: 248 keys). RTL support via dir=rtl attribute on html element when Arabic is selected, with language change listener in i18n config. Language switcher updated to EN | አማ | عر across all apps. Layout components updated to use logical properties (ms-/me-) instead of ml-/mr- for RTL compatibility. Amharic translations were already complete from prior tasks. All frontend apps pass type-checking, backend builds with 0 errors, 877 tests pass.

63-community-events.title: Community Events Module
63-community-events.notes: Created CommunityEvent and EventRsvp Prisma models with indexes. Backend CommunityEventsModule with full CRUD for providers (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /providers/me/events), public endpoints (GET /community-events with country/city/category/eventType filters, GET /community-events/upcoming, GET /community-events/:id, GET /community-events/provider/:id), and RSVP system (POST/GET/DELETE /community-events/:id/rsvp). Provider portal events page with create/edit/delete dialogs, event cards with RSVP counts and status badges. Web app events page with filters (country/city/category/type), event cards with date/time/location/attendance. Events nav added to both provider sidebar and web public header. i18n translations in en.json and am.json for both apps. 35 unit tests covering all service methods and DTO validation. Build passes, 912 tests pass.

64-job-board.title: Job Board Module
64-job-board.notes: Added JobPosting and JobApplication Prisma models. Backend: job-board module with provider CRUD (list/create/update/delete jobs, view applications) and public endpoints (list/filter/search jobs, apply, latest jobs, provider jobs). Frontend: provider-portal jobs page with create/edit/delete dialogs + applications viewer. Web app jobs page with filters (country, city, type, search) and apply dialog. Navigation added to both apps. i18n for en + am. Build passes, 912 tests pass.

65-telegram-mini-app.title: Telegram Mini App
65-telegram-mini-app.notes: Backend: TelegramModule with webhook handler, initData HMAC-SHA256 verification, bot commands (/start, /search, /categories, /deals, /near), deep links (business_slug), location messages, channel posting for new verified businesses and deals via event system. Frontend: Telegram Mini App (React + Vite + TanStack Query) with home, search, categories, deals, business profile views; Telegram theme integration (--tg-theme-* vars with OKLch fallbacks); deep link routing via startapp param; Telegram BackButton integration; i18n (English + Amharic); haptic feedback. Fixed location message handling bug (location check before text check). 46 tests across 4 test suites (service, controller, channel service, DTO). Build passes, all tests pass. | Standards validation warnings

66-seo-social.title: SEO & Social Sharing
66-seo-social.notes: Dynamic <title> and <meta> tags per page via react-helmet-async Seo component. JSON-LD structured data: LocalBusiness schema on business profiles (address, rating, hours, price range, sameAs), BreadcrumbList, WebSite with SearchAction. OG tags (og:title, og:description, og:image, og:type, og:locale) and Twitter card meta tags on all public pages. Backend SitemapModule with XML sitemap generation (static pages, categories, cities, business profiles) and robots.txt endpoint (excluded from api/v1 prefix). Canonical URLs on all pages. Static robots.txt in web public folder. SEO i18n keys in en/am/ar. Build passes, 971 tests pass.

67-analytics-dashboard.title: Analytics & Growth Dashboard
67-analytics-dashboard.notes: Added ProfileView model for tracking page visits. Enhanced analytics module with provider analytics (profile views, inquiries, bookings, revenue with trends, review stats with response rate, contact clicks by type, conversion funnel, daily charts). Added admin platform metrics endpoint (user growth, business growth by country, top categories, top businesses by clicks, verification conversion rate). Updated provider-portal analytics page with real data and review/contact click sections. Enhanced admin dashboard with platform metrics, period selector, and growth indicators. 8 unit tests pass, 979 total tests pass, build succeeds with 0 errors.

68-payment-integration.title: Payment Integration
68-payment-integration.notes: Stripe integration with checkout sessions, billing portal, webhook handler for subscription lifecycle events (created/updated/deleted, invoice paid/failed). Payment model in Prisma for transaction history. Provider portal subscription page with plan selection, billing interval toggle, payment history. Admin revenue dashboard with stats and recent payments. 11 unit tests passing.
